compose_config.stdout:
name: codex
services:
  app:
    command:
      - sh
      - -c
      - pip install --no-cache-dir -r requirements.txt && uvicorn main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000
    container_name: target-app
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy
        required: true
    environment:
      DB_HOST: db
      DB_NAME: appdb
      DB_PASSWORD: wrongpassword
      DB_PORT: "3306"
      DB_USER: appuser
    image: python:3.12-slim
    networks:
      default: null
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /Users/ryoike/Documents/codex/app
        target: /app
        bind: {}
    working_dir: /app
  db:
    container_name: target-db
    environment:
      MYSQL_DATABASE: appdb
      MYSQL_PASSWORD: apppassword
      MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD: rootpassword
      MYSQL_USER: appuser
    healthcheck:
      test:
        - CMD-SHELL
        - mysqladmin ping -h 127.0.0.1 -uroot -p$$MYSQL_ROOT_PASSWORD
      timeout: 3s
      interval: 5s
      retries: 20
      start_period: 20s
    image: mysql:8.4
    networks:
      default: null
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: volume
        source: mysql_data
        target: /var/lib/mysql
        volume: {}
      - type: bind
        source: /Users/ryoike/Documents/codex/db/init.sql
        target: /docker-entrypoint-initdb.d/init.sql
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
  nginx:
    container_name: target-nginx
    depends_on:
      app:
        condition: service_started
        required: true
    image: nginx:1.27-alpine
    networks:
      default: null
    ports:
      - mode: ingress
        target: 80
        published: "8080"
        protocol: tcp
    restart: unless-stopped
    volumes:
      - type: bind
        source: /Users/ryoike/Documents/codex/nginx/nginx.conf
        target: /etc/nginx/nginx.conf
        read_only: true
        bind: {}
networks:
  default:
    name: codex_default
volumes:
  mysql_data:
    name: codex_mysql_data

planner_summary: The application is failing to connect to the database due to an incorrect password configured in app/app.env, leading to 500 errors and Nginx upstream connection failures. The plan is to restore the correct database password in app/app.env and then rebuild the 'app' service to apply the change.
